ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime (e.g., violent, non-violent) */,
  "crime_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the crime (e.g., assault, theft) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_subcategories_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the region is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the neighborhood is located */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime was reported */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported */,
  "abandonment_of_garbage" INTEGER /* Number of abandonment of garbage crimes */,
  "intoxicated_commotion" INTEGER /* Number of intoxicated commotion crimes */,
  "environs_commotion" INTEGER /* Number of environs commotion crimes */,
  "urinating_in_public_places" INTEGER /* Number of urinating in public places crimes */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of other crimes */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the crime was reported */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the crime incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., crime analyst, law enforcement official, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the crime data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "year_wise_crime_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime was reported */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the region in the given year */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_year_wise_crime_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend in crime rate (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crime was reported */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the crime was reported */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_crime_rate" REAL /* Predicted crime rate for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
